---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a feature for an existing tool
title: "[Feature Request]: <feature_name>"
labels: ["feature request"]
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Request

Please provide the following details to help us evaluate your feature suggestion:

### Feature Description
What feature would you like to see added? Please describe it clearly.

### Why is this needed?
How would this feature improve the tool? What problem does it solve?

### Suggested Implementation
Do you have any ideas on how this feature could be implemented? (Optional)

### Optional: Screenshots/References
You can attach screenshots, mockups, or references to similar features.

---
